title: Some of the Historical Events Involving Him and Some Aspects of His Behavior
description: and Some Aspects of His Behavior Ibrahim b. `Abd al-Salam,240 the son of al-Sindi 's brother, and called Abu TUtah,241 has mentioned that al-Sindi b. Shahik242 transmitted the information to him, saying: I was with Musa in jurjan. At that point, there came to him the messenger announcing the death of al-Mahdi and his own succession to the caliphate. So he set off for Baghdad, in company with Said b. Salm (b. Qutaybah),2'3 using the relays of the band system, and sent me on to Khurisan.24 Said b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
